strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and cloud-native development
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP (Model Context Protocol) and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, a geo-data platform used by NGOs and conservation professionals
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML or cloud platform strategy experience in leadership roles; recent AI work is tooling-focused rather than strategic product development
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field, despite extensive experience
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on AI technologies in past roles
response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and demonstrates strong technical depth in AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks clear evidence of strategic AI/ML expertise or cloud platform strategy leadership, which are core to the role. His entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective) is a positive but doesn't fully offset the gaps in strategic AI/cloud focus.
